programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the fauna of Africa, home to the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth. But even in this land of plenty, animals face huge challenges. At its heart is a vast tropical rainforest full of life, where young chimpanzees learn how to use tools to make the most of the jungles riches. With knowledge passed down from generation to generation, they can access the best forest foods(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his team help the Newcombe family in Kent, who need to adapt their home to be able to care for their two-year-old son Arlo, who has condition that means his lungs must be constantly supported by breathing apparatus. Trailing breathing tubes, equipment the size of tumble dryers, and no downstairs bathroom have turned their once safe home into a risky space for the family. Nick and the team have amassed a huge group of volunteers for Arlo and the family, as they set to work creating a safe and inspiring space that Arlo and his family can call home(n)

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: A keeper at Longleat House and Safari Park discovers a concerning abscess on one of her red pandas. After antibiotics and painkillers fail to help the growth, Koda needs an urgent visit to the vet for an operation. Presented by Ben Fogle and Kate Humble(n)

programme.title: Final Score
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad presents a round-up of the classified results and this afternoon's news from the Premier League, EFL and Scotland(n)

programme.title: Final Score from Northern Ireland
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's action along with the classified results(n)

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present a special Sports Personality of the Year edition of the general knowledge quiz, with contestants Ama Agbeze, Greg Rusedski, Eddie Izzard, Hannah Cockcroft, Rebecca Adlington, Michael O'Neill, Jayne Torvill, Robin Cousins and Geraint Thomas(n)

programme.title: The Hit List
programme.desc: Marvin and Rochelle Humes present the high-tempo, music-based quiz show in which contestants must name as many hit songs and artists as possible under intense pressure, with a potential £10,000 jackpot up for grabs. This week's contestants are mother and daughter Tracey and Drea from High Wycombe, married couple Daniel and Rebecca from Aberdare, and brothers Karl and Ivan from Manchester. Whether it's a song from the swinging 60s or the number-one track in today's charts, the teams must prove their ability to recognise hits from all genres of music - from pop to country, rock to R&B and many more(n)

programme.title: Strictly Come Dancing
programme.desc: Tess Daly and Claudia Winkleman host the final of the pro-celebrity contest, which sees the remaining couples - Kelvin Fletcher and Oti Mabuse, Emma Barton and Anton Du Beke, and Karim Zeroual and Amy Dowden - perform a routine of their own choosing, one set by the judges and one last show dance. As usual Shirley Ballas, Bruno Tonioli, Craig Revel Horwood and Motsi Mabuse will be reviewing their efforts, but only the viewers' votes will count to determine the winner. There is also a performance by pop superstar Taylor Swift(n)

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: Ellie Goulding hands Michael her phone for Send To All and there is a performance by tenor Andrea Bocelli. Plus, two brothers from Coventry visit a relaxing spa, but get a shock when they find themselves on stage at the London Palladium as they become the Unexpected Stars of the Show(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Liverpool v Watford at Anfield and Leicester City v Norwich City at the King Power Stadium. Jurgen Klopp's Reds held an extremely strong recent record over the Hornets, with their last three meetings on this ground finishing 5-0, 5-0 and 6-1. The home fans will have been hoping for more of the same to maintain their push for a first-ever Premier League title. Plus, action from Burnley v Newcastle United at Turf Moor, Chelsea v Bournemouth at Stamford Bridge, Sheffield United v Aston Villa at Bramall Lane and Southampton v West Ham United at St Mary's Stadium(n)

programme.title: The NFL Show
programme.desc: Mark Chapman is joined by former players Osi Umenyiora and Jason Bell to present highlights of Thursday night's AFC game - Baltimore Ravens v New York Jets at M&T Bank Stadium(n)

programme.title: The Heist (2009)
programme.desc: Roger, a security guard working at an American museum, discovers several pieces from a collection he has defended for more than a decade are due to be sold to a gallery in Denmark. Chief among them is The Lonely Maiden, a painting he has grown to adore during his years of service. Determined to stop the sale from taking place, he enlists the aid of two like-minded guards in a desperate mission to steal the artworks they have come to love. Crime comedy, starring Christopher Walken, Morgan Freeman and William H Macy(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Ben Thompson and Rachel Burden present a round-up of national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Liverpool v Watford at Anfield and Leicester City v Norwich City at the King Power Stadium. Jurgen Klopp's Reds held an extremely strong recent record over the Hornets, with their last three meetings on this ground finishing 5-0, 5-0 and 6-1. The home fans will have been hoping for more of the same to maintain their push for a first-ever Premier League title. Plus, action from Burnley v Newcastle United at Turf Moor, Chelsea v Bournemouth at Stamford Bridge, Sheffield United v Aston Villa at Bramall Lane and Southampton v West Ham United at St Mary's Stadium(n)

programme.title: The Andrew Marr Show
programme.desc: A round-up of the week's stories, featuring interviews with key figures in politics and current affairs and a round-up of the Sunday papers. Including news and weather at 10.00(n)

programme.title: Sunday Politics Northern Ireland
programme.desc: The latest political news and debate, and reports from around the Province. Presented by Mark Carruthers(n)

programme.title: Britain's Christmas Story
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gareth Malone and Karen Gibson reveal the stories and legends behind some of Britain's festive traditions. Here they follow the story of Christmas on these shores from its origins, through the lavish partying of Elizabethan times, to the banning of the celebrations in the 17th-century. Along the way they discover that carols were once as much about dancing as singing, and find out why a holy site in Norfolk, known as England's Nazareth, once rivalled Jerusalem and Rome as a destination for pilgrims(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion challenges two teams to scour an antiques fair in Dorking, Surrey, to find items to sell at auction, with Caroline Hawley and David Harper offering advice(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: For the third Sunday of Advent, the Rev Kate Bottley visits a farm in Devon where children are invited to perform the nativity story with real animals(n)

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Claire Skinner presents an appeal on behalf of the charity Kids(n)

programme.title: The Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Skipper, Kowalski, Private and Rico embark on an adventure on Christmas Eve. Animated film spin-off of the popular films, featuring the voices of John DiMaggio and Tom McGrath(n)

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted (2012)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals continue their quest to get back to their New York home. Having made it to Monte Carlo, they join a circus on a European tour as a means of travelling undetected - but an animal control agent is in hot pursuit. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith(n)

programme.title: Animal Park Summer Special
programme.desc: Lemurs Maurice and Angelo are rushed into surgery with injuries sustained in a fight and the lions have to dig for their dinner in a test of their sense of smell(n)

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the fauna of Africa, home to the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth. But even in this land of plenty, animals face huge challenges. At its heart is a vast tropical rainforest full of life, where young chimpanzees learn how to use tools to make the most of the jungles riches. With knowledge passed down from generation to generation, they can access the best forest foods(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Matt Baker, Margherita Taylor and Steve Brown are in Buckinghamshire, where Matt is with a group of schoolchildren making their very first visit to a farm. Margherita meets the people working hard to preserve some of the UK's last box trees and finds out what's at stake for those that use it to make fine woodwind instruments, while Steve heads to Tiggywinkles wildlife hospital, where he helps return a couple of barn owls to the wild(n)

programme.title: Sports Personality of the Year
programme.desc: Gabby Logan, Clare Balding and Gary Lineker present this year's ceremony live from P&J Live Arena in Aberdeen. Geraint Thomas was presented the prestigious main award in 2018, and the nominees this time around are cricketer Ben Stokes, sprinter Dina Asher-Smith, Formula One star Lewis Hamilton, heptathlete Katarina Johnson-Thompson, Wales rugby union legend Alun Wyn Jones and Manchester City and England forward Raheem Sterling. The Team of the Year, Coach of the Year, Lifetime Achievement, Overseas Sports Personality of the Year, Young Sports Personality of the Year, Unsung Hero and Helen Rollason awards will also be handed out, and there is live music from Lewis Capaldi and Emeli Sande(n)

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: Separated from her friends, Lyra must use all of her methods of deception to thwart a formidable foe. Meanwhile, Mrs Coulter plots her next move. Adaptation of Philip Pullman's epic fantasy, starring Dafne Keen and Ruth Wilson(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman reviews the day's Premier League action, including Arsenal v Manchester City at Etihad Stadium, as the Citizens looked to extend a run of five consecutive victories over the Gunners. Plus, Wolverhampton Wanderers v Tottenham Hotspur at Molineux, Manchester United v Everton at Old Trafford, and a round-up of yesterday's goals(n)

programme.title: The Women's Football Show
programme.desc: Highlights of the weekend's games in the Super League, including Everton v Arsenal at Walton Hall Park, Manchester City v Brighton & Hove Albion at the Academy Stadium and Liverpool v Chelsea at Prenton Park(n)

programme.title: A Question of Sport
programme.desc: England midfielder Jill Scott, Olympic Taekwondo silver medallist Lutalo Muhammad, rugby league great Kevin Sinfield and Great Britain 400m runner Emily Diamond join team captains Matt Dawson and Phil Tufnell and host Sue Barker on the quiz(n)

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Dan Walker and Louise Minchin present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather(n)

programme.title: Meet the Street at Christmas
programme.desc: Mark De-Lisser goes into communities around Wales and creates choirs for people who feel isolated, beginning by setting one up in a rural area. Mark meets Dossie, a villager who now lives alone after her husband passed away, and Ella, who has recently moved back with her parents after university and is struggling to make new friends. Can he pull a group together not only to put on a performance of their lifetimes, but to help them make lasting connections with a real impact?(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell revisits a detached house in Gillingham, Kent, she first saw in 2017. Plus, a semi-detached in Walsall, West Midlands, and an end terrace in Stoke-on-Trent(n)

programme.title: Island Medics
programme.desc: A specialist surgeon travels to Shetland to carry out a complex operation, while a Fair Isle man hopes to get the all-clear after surgery to find out if cancer has been kept at bay(n)

programme.title: The Customer Is Always Right
programme.desc: British entrepreneurs' products are put to the test, as consumers unbox, test and score a portion control plate, a music box and an innovative dog lead. Lucy Alexander presents(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Experts Charles Hanson and David Harper help two teams search for Christmas bargains at Wetherby Racecourse in West Yorkshire, while presenter Charlie Ross visits York Theatre Royal to learn about the history of pantomime(n)

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland(n)

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Emma struggles to make sense of what has happened, while Ruhma has surprise news for a pregnant woman in police custody(n)

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Following reports of Flambeau's death, the clerical sleuth races to protect a crown that contains a nail from the crucifixion of Christ. Mark Williams stars(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson heads to South Wales with a couple who are looking for a country home after three decades of military housing, and have a budget of £430,000 to spend. Away from the property search, Jules dons his own army fatigues to discover how the beautiful Welsh wilderness prepares soldiers for battle(n)

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie, David and Harry face a challenge in Liphook, Hampshire, where a couple have a big garden and a daughter with her own ideas on what makes the perfect outdoor space(n)

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Lucia Scalisi tries to mend a serious tear in a portrait, William Kirk and Steven Fletcher join forces to fix a walking stick and Brenton West tackles a seaside telescope(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: The first visit of the week to the One Show studio, featuring the usual mix of topical stories and celebrity chat(n)

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: For the past five years, a radical new church has been promising hundreds of young people an escape from gangs and crime and a pathway to salvation through prosperity and success. SPAC Nation, the Salvation Proclaimers Anointed Church, holds services in hotels, conference halls and football grounds and leader Tobi Adegboyega has been courted by politicians and the media for his work in tackling gang violence. But Panorama has discovered how the church's outward show of concern for young people may hide a less than charitable appetite for money. Reporter Greg McKenzie investigates its fundraising activities and speaks to young worshippers who say they've been forced into debt whilst church leaders enjoy lavish lifestyles(n)

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Phil is sure Sharon and Jack are having an affair and sets out for revenge, despite Ben's efforts to convince him otherwise. Martin is on a high following another job with Tubbs, only for Sonia to bring him down when she quizzes him about his sudden wealth. Mick is frustrated when Ollie does not land a main role in the school nativity so he plans his own version - but Linda, Tina and Shirley make him realise it will not be quite so easy. Jay entrusts Stuart to manage the undertaker's(n)

programme.title: A Berry Royal Christmas
programme.desc: The Duke and Duchess of Cambridge invite Mary to accompany them on four special visits to charities they support, meeting staff who work throughout the festive season. Mary also prepare a feast for a Christmas party hosted by the royal couple for the volunteers and gets help preparing the dishes from special guests including former Bake Off winner Nadiya Hussain - and the Duke and Duchess themselves. Throughout the programme Mary also cooks some of her favourite Christmas recipes for viewers to try out at home(n)

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: The festive season arrives once again in the Brown household, and Father Damian has organised a Christmas decoration contest to support the local football team. Agnes is keen to enter, especially as it might mean getting one over her old nemesis, Hillary Nicholson, but is soon distracted by her new 'wi-fi assistant' and quite what to do with it(n)

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: The baby is due soon and Siobhan is upset with the nonstop arguing of both families, so Orla tries to come up with a solution. She suggests that everyone go away for a weekend break together to neighbouring Co Kerry and try to learn to get along for Siobhan and the baby's sake, but no-one seems convinced this is a good idea(n)

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Pointless co-host Alexander Armstrong takes over the reins for an extended edition of the satirical quiz, with stand-up comedian Jon Richardson one of two guests joining captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the week's events(n)

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Oscar-winners Judi Dench and Jennifer Hudson talk about the new film version of Cats, Hollywood stars Hugh Grant and Matthew McConaughey discuss their new action thriller The Gentlemen and everyone's favourite crooner Michael Buble also drops in for a chat. Plus, Coldplay offer an exclusive performance from their new album Everyday Life and more intrepid audience members willing to recount an anecdote from the dreaded red chair try their luck(n)

programme.title: Political Highlights
programme.desc: Recorded coverage of political and parliamentary highlights(n)

programme.title: Election 2019
programme.desc: Huw Edwards takes the helm for the BBC's comprehensive overnight coverage as the results of the General Election are announced, joined by Laura Kuenssberg, Katya Adler, Faisal Islam and Amol Rajan, along with Professor John Curtice. Sophie Raworth analyses the results on a giant map of the UK, Sarah Smith and Kirsty Wark broadcast live from Scotland, and correspondents including Naga Munchetty, Andrew Marr, Martha Kearney, Nick Robinson and Lucy Manning will have news and results from key constituency locations across the country. Finally, the exit poll - and the eventual result - will be projected onto Old Broadcasting House, providing a clear idea of who will be leading the country over the next five years(n)

programme.title: Election 2019
programme.desc: Huw Edwards presents further overnight coverage as the results of the General Election are announced, joined by Laura Kuenssberg, Katya Adler, Faisal Islam and Amol Rajan, along with Professor John Curtice. Sophie Raworth analyses the results on a giant map of the UK, Sarah Smith and Kirsty Wark broadcast live from Scotland, and correspondents including Naga Munchetty, Andrew Marr, Martha Kearney, Nick Robinson and Lucy Manning will have news and results from key constituency locations across the country(n)

programme.title: Election 2019
programme.desc: Huw Edwards presents further General Election results, with Laura Kuenssberg, Sophie Raworth, Katya Adler, Faisal Islam and Amol Rajan analysing the figures. Including regional news and weather at 6.30, 7.30 and 8.30(n)

programme.title: Election 2019
programme.desc: Emily Maitlis presents from Westminster, with all the results and reaction from the 2019 General Election so far. Clive Myrie reports from Downing Street as the UK finds out who'll be its next Prime Minister, while Victoria Derbyshire talks to voters in Birmingham, Christian Fraser and John Curtice analyse the results, and Louise Minchin presents the latest election news from across the country(n)

programme.title: Eòrpa (European Current Affairs)
programme.desc: Weekly insight into the major political, social and cultural issues hitting the headlines across Europe. In Gaelic(n)

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: As the dust settles after the first winter General Election in decades, Fiona Bruce is joined in London by guests from across the political spectrum to ascertain what changes the outcome is likely to bring. The main focus is Brexit, and what changes are most likely for the United Kingdom in terms of its future relationship with the European Union. However, the campaign also turned up a lot of other issues regarding the NHS, public spending and defence, and all these matters are likely to be debated in this special edition(n)

programme.title: Gino's Italian Escape
programme.desc: Gino D'Acampo begins this week in the Italian food capital of Bologna, where he picks up a snack for his journey - the Bolognese classic panino with mortadella. He then boards the train and heads towards the rice growing region of Mantova, where he helps out in the paddies and makes a chocolate rice pudding. He then visits Verona, home of one of the country's oldest art schools. Here he models for the students in their life-drawing class before serving up meatballs in tomato sauce for the young artists(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate the murder of a prize-winning author on the eve of the Midsomer Literary Festival. The event goes ahead as planned, but a killing occurs during a blackout at a packed reception hosted by the widow of another writer, and it is not long before the detectives uncover corruption, sexual scandal and financial mismanagement. Guest starring Stella Gonet, with John Nettles and John Hopkins(n)

programme.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story (2016)
programme.desc: In a galaxy far, far away, Jyn Erso - the maverick daughter of scientist Galen Erso - joins the Rebel Alliance. On the planet Scarif, she and the freedom fighters, including a blind warrior and a deadpan droid, attempt to steal plans for the Death Star, a battle station capable of destroying entire worlds, which was designed by her father on behalf of the Empire. However, the Rebels face tough competition from Imperial warlord Orson Krennic and shadowy forces, including Darth Vader, who will come to play a major part in the rise of the Empire. Star Wars prequel set before the events of A New Hope, starring Felicity Jones, Diego Luna and Ben Mendelsohn(n)

From the first to the last, the programme reveals what they get up to in their first few days of freedom, and captures their reactions to old rivals and trusted friends, while their families gather for emotional reunions with their loved ones(n)

programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate when the body of a woman is pulled from the river during the local Oak Apple carnival. programme.title: Gino's Italian Escape
programme.desc: Gino D'Acampo begins this week in the Italian food capital of Bologna, where he picks up a snack for his journey - the Bolognese classic panino with mortadella. He then boards the train and heads towards the rice growing region of Mantova, where he helps out in the paddies and makes a chocolate rice pudding. He then visits Verona, home of one of the country's oldest art schools. Here he models for the students in their life-drawing class before serving up meatballs in tomato sauce for the young artists(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate the murder of a prize-winning author on the eve of the Midsomer Literary Festival. The event goes ahead as planned, but a killing occurs during a blackout at a packed reception hosted by the widow of another writer, and it is not long before the detectives uncover corruption, sexual scandal and financial mismanagement. Guest starring Stella Gonet, with John Nettles and John Hopkins(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point

programme.title: Take Me Out
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness hosts a one-off 1980s edition of the dating game. A group of men enters the 'love lift' in the hope of impressing 30 single women and winning a date - but must first get the female participants to keep their lights on as a sign of approval(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Angellica Bell, Oritse Williams, Leslie Ash and Ian Lavender pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story (2016)
programme.desc: In a galaxy far, far away, Jyn Erso - the maverick daughter of scientist Galen Erso - joins the Rebel Alliance. On the planet Scarif, she and the freedom fighters, including a blind warrior and a deadpan droid, attempt to steal plans for the Death Star, a battle station capable of destroying entire worlds, which was designed by her father on behalf of the Empire. However, the Rebels face tough competition from Imperial warlord Orson Krennic and shadowy forces, including Darth Vader, who will come to play a major part in the rise of the Empire. Star Wars prequel set before the events of A New Hope, starring Felicity Jones, Diego Luna and Ben Mendelsohn(n)

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: Just a few days after the new King or Queen of the jungle was crowned, Ant and Dec present the usual round-up of what happened behind the scenes as each campmate was voted out. From the first to the last, the programme reveals what they get up to in their first few days of freedom, and captures their reactions to old rivals and trusted friends, while their families gather for emotional reunions with their loved ones(n)

programme.title: Bang on the Money
programme.desc: Rickie Haywood-Williams and Melvin Odoom host the final edition of the high-precision game show. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate when the body of a woman is pulled from the river during the local Oak Apple carnival. Closer inspection suggests the drowning was deliberate - and, as the detectives find out more about the villagers, they learn the killing could be linked to the death of the victim's daughter eight years previously. John Nettles and Jason Hughes play the intrepid policemen, with guest star Simon Callow(n)

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: A soldier of fortune joins an academic and her conniving brother on an expedition to an ancient Egyptian lost city. The explorers accidentally cause the spirit of a vengeful priest with awe-inspiring supernatural powers to rise from his tomb, leading to a desperate battle for survival. Fantasy action adventure, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo and Oded Fehr(n)

Fantasy comedy, starring Will Ferrell, James Caan, Zooey Deschanel and Edward Asner(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Part one of two. The Griffins are stuck indoors during a blackout, so Peter passes the time by telling a story spoofing Star Wars. programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Part one of two. The Griffins are stuck indoors during a blackout, so Peter passes the time by telling a story spoofing Star Wars. programme.title: Shopping with Keith Lemon
programme.desc: Keith picks out stocking fillers with Strictly star Michelle Visage, looks for gifts with singer Ella Eyre and finds the perfect party dress with This Morning's Holly Willoughby(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: When their house is subjected to a compulsory purchase order, the Ropers swap urban surroundings for suburbia, where Mildred dreams of climbing the social ladder. George, on the other hand, wants to maintain as low a profile as possible. First episode of the sitcom, starring Yootha Joyce and Brian Murphy(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is asked to investigate the disappearance of a bank's most valued customer, who had been planning to sell the chairman a map showing where to find a long-lost silver mine. David Suchet stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: When a member of Oxford University's examinations board is found dead, Morse deduces he must have overheard a conversation someone wanted to keep secret at all costs. However, his theory has one major flaw - the victim was deaf. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Barbara Flynn, Michael Gough, Clive Swift, Roger Lloyd Pack and Frederick Treves(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. While holidaying at the plush Bertram's Hotel in London, Miss Marple is presented with a fresh challenge to her deductive powers when the reading of a will leads to a double murder. Geraldine McEwan stars as the elderly spinster with a nose for a mystery, with guest appearances by Peter Davison, Mica Paris and Francesca Annis(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster is invited to the wedding of her former housemaid Gwenda, only to be caught up in a murder mystery involving the groom's family. Geraldine McEwan stars, with Juliet Stevenson, Denis Lawson and Alison Steadman(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When a business magnate, his wife and their maid are murdered, Miss Marple (Julia McKenzie) is prompted by the circumstances surrounding the incidents to recall the nursery rhyme Sing a Song of Sixpence. She discovers the victims were part of a family tainted by secrets, and as she ponders the significance of the tune, a past scandal reveals itself. Murder mystery, featuring Wendy Richard as feisty cook Mrs Crump, in her final dramatic role. Other guest stars include Prunella Scales, Matthew Macfadyen, Ralf Little, Rupert Graves and Helen Baxendale(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate the cloistered world of Midsomer Priory when a nun is found strangled. The detectives uncover a complex mystery involving holy orders, teenage romantic liaisons, African art and missing antique silver as the community is forced to open its doors to 21st-century policing. Former EastEnders actor Cliff Parisi (Minty) guest stars alongside Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper detective accepts an invitation to spend yuletide at the house of an elderly millionaire who seems intent on provoking his money-grubbing sons into murdering him. At first he tries hard to ignore the strained atmosphere and relax - but soon finds himself with a gruesome mystery on his hands. Agatha Christie whodunit, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Nelson discover that the exciting world of stunt pilots and military heroes hides many dark secrets after the owner of Finchmere Airfield is hit on the head and dropped to his death from a plane. Are anti-aircraft campaigners behind Bernard King's murder, or is the incident linked to a tragic Second World War mission? Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee are joined by guest stars including June Whitfield, Robert Bathurst, Bernard Cribbins and Laila Rouass(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: It's a time of joy and happiness in Midsomer for once - Christmas is coming, and DCI Barnaby and his wife Sarah are soon to become parents. But the festive mood changes when a man is stabbed to death with an antique sword during a ghost-hunting party at a spooky manor house in Morton Shallows. Is blacksmith's daughter Rose Wilton seeking revenge from beyond the grave, or will Barnaby and sidekick Charlie Nelson find a more earthly motive behind the murder? Starring Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee, with Fiona Dolman, Les Dennis, Elizabeth Berrington, Mark Heap, Emily Joyce, James Murray and Hannah Tointon(n)

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: A body is pulled from the loch and soon identified by the pathologist - while a photograph in the dead man's wallet provides Annie and Quigley with a vital clue. Annie tries to gather further evidence by talking to a desperate Mhari, who refuses to believe the terrifying possibility she is presented with concerning her own son. Albrighton is threatened with arrest by Quigley, but nevertheless continues to pursue his own theory about the killings - even if it means putting his life on the line to prove himself right(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: The Ropers meet their new neighbours' dog, and George discusses politics with his local MP. Comedy, starring Yootha Joyce and Brian Murphy(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: As the Ropers settle into their new home, George realises he is going to have to look for a job. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A crime wave hits Ashfordly train station as a number of freight wagons mysteriously vanish, giving the police a tricky case to crack, but a sandwich could provide a vital clue. Peggy has plans to make some fast money when she decides to play dirty in the local bowls tournament, while a night out in Whitby proves eventful for Walker and Helen. Rural drama, starring Gwen Taylor, Jonathan Kerrigan and Sophie Ward(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A girl is injured in a horse riding accident, leading the police to stumble upon a sinister series of animal thefts. Helen tries to tell Rob she doesn't want a relationship with him, but worries about hurting his feelings. Meanwhile, Oscar catches Peggy and David hosting a poker tournament in the Aidensfield Arms and bars them from the pub. Rural drama starring Sophie Ward, Derek Fowlds, Gwen Taylor and David Lonsdale(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Ever since a beautiful American woman arrived in the peaceful village of Wychwood-under-Ashe, people have begun to die in a series of apparent accidents. Nobody suspects a killer is at work but, as the body count rises, Miss Marple digs a little deeper with the help of a former policeman - and they gradually unearth a secret that will rock the village to its core. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, Benedict Cumberbatch, David Haig, Sylvia Syms, Margo Stilley and Hugo Speer(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An FBI agent crosses swords with Poirot while trying to retrieve the American Navy's top-secret plans for a new submarine, which have been stolen by a glamorous nightclub singer with a sideline in espionage. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper detective accepts an invitation to spend yuletide at the house of an elderly millionaire who seems intent on provoking his money-grubbing sons into murdering him. At first he tries hard to ignore the strained atmosphere and relax - but soon finds himself with a gruesome mystery on his hands. Agatha Christie whodunit, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Nelson discover that the exciting world of stunt pilots and military heroes hides many dark secrets after the owner of Finchmere Airfield is hit on the head and dropped to his death from a plane. Are anti-aircraft campaigners behind Bernard King's murder, or is the incident linked to a tragic Second World War mission? Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee are joined by guest stars including June Whitfield, Robert Bathurst, Bernard Cribbins and Laila Rouass(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An American businessman fears his life is in danger while travelling on the Orient Express from Istanbul to Paris, and offers fellow passenger Poirot $10,000 for protection. After rejecting the proposal, the sleuth wakes up the following morning to learn the man has been stabbed to death while the train was held up by heavy snow in Serbia. Racing against time to find the killer among the passengers, Poirot must look to the past to solve the crime, and is faced with a decision that will haunt him for ever. David Suchet takes the title role in the murder mystery, with guest stars Hugh Bonneville, David Morrissey and Eileen Atkins(n)

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: A woman and her daughter move to a sleepy French village in 1959 and brazenly open a chocolate shop directly opposite the Catholic parish church during Lent. At first the locals are enraged and appalled, but her confections soon raise spirits in the community, especially among the wives. Drama adapted from Joanne Harris's novel, with Juliette Binoche, Johnny Depp, Alfred Molina and Judi Dench(n)

programme.title: Paul O'Grady's Animal Orphans
programme.desc: In his final week in Africa, the comedian and presenter visits Bambelela, a rehabilitation centre for orphaned vervet monkeys, where he looks after 10-month-old Toledo for the day. Returning to Moholoholo Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre, Paul discovers what it's like to be a volunteer, from the daily walk through the Bush, to cleaning the enclosures and encountering the smelliest animal at the facility, a honey badger called Julius. After that, he heads to Hoedspruit Endangered Species Centre to meet Little G, an orphaned rhino who has been given a permanent companion, a sheep named Lamby(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Downtrodden detective Jack Frost investigates after an unidentified man's body is found on top of a pile of glass at a council recycling centre - and the subsequent autopsy reveals a few surprises. Another case is soon on the cards when an apparent suicide raises suspicions. On the personal front, Frost decides to get in shape and joins a gym, where he falls for the charms of his fitness trainer. Starring David Jason and Claire Cox(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack finds himself working alongside DS Lawson on a delicate case involving a spate of attacks on defenceless senior citizens in their homes, while Lawson also offers him some advice on his personal life. David Jason stars, with Bruce Alexander, Sally Dexter and Neil Phillips(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim drives some yuppies around all day, putting up with their jokes about the Irish. Mavis is suspicious when Derek works every evening, and Alex tells Tanya he is leaving Val(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mavis convinces herself Derek has got another woman. Des asks Tanya to finish with Alex. Raquel feels sorry for Tanya having to 'share her man'(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim and Frank discuss getting remarried, he offers Seth a job at the heritage farm, and Eric leads a small ceremony for the memorial to the victims(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah is concerned that the baby has stopped moving, Frank confronts Chris about the money he owes, and Alan fears financial ruin(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Walker receives a tempting offer from an old friend, but as the proposition involves a spot of rule-bending on his part, the decision to go through with it could land him in serious trouble, especially as Sgt Miller already seems less than impressed by the policeman's rebellious nature. Rural drama starring, Jonathan Kerrigan, John Duttine and Mark Jordon(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George seeks solace when his budgie dies, but Mildred is too preoccupied with finding something good enough to donate to the jumble sale. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George celebrates his 24th wedding anniversary by presenting Mildred with a carriage clock. However, he has purchased it cut-price from a dubious source, and when the Fourmiles return from holiday they find their home burgled, and among the missing items is a carriage clock. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy and Jo invite a German guest to their dinner party - but Mr Roper demonstrates that the Second World War has not ended as far as he is concerned(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy tries to impress Miller by going it alone, while the arrival of tax inspector Derek Ford gets the residents of Aidensfield panicked. Vernon bears the brunt of Ford's wrath when his dodgy dealings and poor record-keeping are exposed, convincing the wheeler dealer the only way to avoid trouble is to fake his own suicide. Rural drama, guest starring James Weaver, with Mark Jordon, Geoffrey Hughes and John Duttine(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eric is angry that his photo has appeared in the paper. The health of Sarah's baby is checked. Alan tries to get one over on Lynn. Zoe and Frank talk about Chris(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack plans to ask Frank for more money. Kathy gets upset because she feels trapped with Chris. Nick heads off to see his solicitor(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Derek asks Mavis to trust him. Andy and Curly leave Jack stranded on the roof of the observatory. Des is put out when he sees Tanya on a date with Alex(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack refuses to come off the roof until he has freed Fergie. Eventually his limbs go numb and he is unable to move. Mavis is horrified to hear Derek begging Don for a job(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The glamorous Ruth Van Rydock contacts her old friend Jane Marple with a mystery - her sister Carrie Louise's study has been devastated by a suspicious fire. While Carrie Louise has the same cheerful outlook as ever, Ruth fears dark forces are at play at Stonygates, the home Carrie shares with her third husband, various relatives and a motley crew of young criminals, the latest subject of Carrie's philanthropic endeavours. But on the evening before a theatrical show is staged for their guests, one of whom is Miss Marple, an even more fascinating performance takes place before their very eyes - one where the final act is murder. Julia McKenzie stars, with guest appearances from Joan Collins, Penelope Wilton, Brian Cox, Maxine Peake, Alexei Sayle, Sarah Smart, Ian Ogilvy, Sean Hughes and Nigel Terry(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy tries to impress Miller by going it alone, while the arrival of tax inspector Derek Ford gets the residents of Aidensfield panicked. Vernon bears the brunt of Ford's wrath when his dodgy dealings and poor record-keeping are exposed, convincing the wheeler dealer the only way to avoid trouble is to fake his own suicide. Rural drama, guest starring James Weaver, with Mark Jordon, Geoffrey Hughes and John Duttine(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An aristocrat's wealthy, overbearing wife finances a North African archaeological dig to find the skull of John the Baptist. Poirot is in attendance, but when the woman is found stabbed to death, and only her husband, the exuberant Lord Boynton, appears distraught, the detective struggles to identify the killer among the wealth of suspects. Guest starring Tim Curry, Cheryl Campbell, John Hannah, Emma Cunniffe, Mark Gatiss, Angela Pleasence and Beth Goddard, with David Suchet in the title role(n)

programme.title: The Bletchley Circle: San Francisco
programme.desc: A bloodied and battered stranger collapses on Millie and Jean's doorstep, dragging them into a mysterious warring underworld. In a race against time, the four women must unravel the patterns behind a series of attacks in order to avoid becoming the next victims. Drama set during the mid-1950s, following four women gifted with extraordinary intelligence, capacity for pattern recognition and decryption. Crystal Balint, Rachael Stirling, Julie Graham and Chanelle Peloso star(n)

programme.title: Cheat
programme.desc: University lecturer Dr Leah Dale has always prided herself on her academic integrity, so when final-year student Rose Vaughan submits a suspiciously top-grade essay, Leah is quick to call her out. But there's more going on than meets the eye as Rose takes the challenge as a personal affront, and what begins as a seemingly open-and-shut case of academic deception soon spirals out of control. Drama, starring Katherine Kelly and Molly Windsor(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: The Leopard's Den residents are devastated when Du Plessis reveals he is moving to England to be with Caroline - especially Danny when he realises his friend's flight leaves the following day. Fatani buys a lion that will not come out of its cage, and when Rosie investigates she discovers a shocking case of negligence by the previous owner, so vows to do whatever is necessary to save the man's other animals. Deon Stewardson, Lucy-Jo Hudson and Stephen Tompkinson star(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: When their house is subjected to a compulsory purchase order, the Ropers swap urban surroundings for suburbia, where Mildred dreams of climbing the social ladder. George, on the other hand, wants to maintain as low a profile as possible. First episode of the sitcom, starring Yootha Joyce and Brian Murphy(n)

programme.desc: Downtrodden detective Jack Frost investigates after an unidentified man's body is found on top of a pile of glass at a council recycling centre - and the subsequent autopsy reveals a few surprises. Another case is soon on the cards when an apparent suicide raises suspicions. On the personal front, Frost decides to get in shape and joins a gym, where he falls for the charms of his fitness trainer. Starring David Jason and Claire Cox(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack finds himself working alongside DS Lawson on a delicate case involving a spate of attacks on defenceless senior citizens in their homes, while Lawson also offers him some advice on his personal life. David Jason stars, with Bruce Alexander, Sally Dexter and Neil Phillips(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim drives some yuppies around all day, putting up with their jokes about the Irish. Mavis is suspicious when Derek works every evening, and Alex tells Tanya he is leaving Val(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mavis convinces herself Derek has got another woman. Des asks Tanya to finish with Alex. Raquel feels sorry for Tanya having to 'share her man'(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim and Frank discuss getting remarried, he offers Seth a job at the heritage farm, and Eric leads a small ceremony for the memorial to the victims(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah is concerned that the baby has stopped moving, Frank confronts Chris about the money he owes, and Alan fears financial ruin(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Walker receives a tempting offer from an old friend, but as the proposition involves a spot of rule-bending on his part, the decision to go through with it could land him in serious trouble, especially as Sgt Miller already seems less than impressed by the policeman's rebellious nature. Rural drama starring, Jonathan Kerrigan, John Duttine and Mark Jordon(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George seeks solace when his budgie dies, but Mildred is too preoccupied with finding something good enough to donate to the jumble sale. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George celebrates his 24th wedding anniversary by presenting Mildred with a carriage clock. However, he has purchased it cut-price from a dubious source, and when the Fourmiles return from holiday they find their home burgled, and among the missing items is a carriage clock. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy and Jo invite a German guest to their dinner party - but Mr Roper demonstrates that the Second World War has not ended as far as he is concerned(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy tries to impress Miller by going it alone, while the arrival of tax inspector Derek Ford gets the residents of Aidensfield panicked. Vernon bears the brunt of Ford's wrath when his dodgy dealings and poor record-keeping are exposed, convincing the wheeler dealer the only way to avoid trouble is to fake his own suicide. Rural drama, guest starring James Weaver, with Mark Jordon, Geoffrey Hughes and John Duttine(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eric is angry that his photo has appeared in the paper. The health of Sarah's baby is checked. Alan tries to get one over on Lynn. Zoe and Frank talk about Chris(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack plans to ask Frank for more money. Kathy gets upset because she feels trapped with Chris. Nick heads off to see his solicitor(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Derek asks Mavis to trust him. Andy and Curly leave Jack stranded on the roof of the observatory. Des is put out when he sees Tanya on a date with Alex(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack refuses to come off the roof until he has freed Fergie. Eventually his limbs go numb and he is unable to move. Mavis is horrified to hear Derek begging Don for a job(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The glamorous Ruth Van Rydock contacts her old friend Jane Marple with a mystery - her sister Carrie Louise's study has been devastated by a suspicious fire. While Carrie Louise has the same cheerful outlook as ever, Ruth fears dark forces are at play at Stonygates, the home Carrie shares with her third husband, various relatives and a motley crew of young criminals, the latest subject of Carrie's philanthropic endeavours. But on the evening before a theatrical show is staged for their guests, one of whom is Miss Marple, an even more fascinating performance takes place before their very eyes - one where the final act is murder. Julia McKenzie stars, with guest appearances from Joan Collins, Penelope Wilton, Brian Cox, Maxine Peake, Alexei Sayle, Sarah Smart, Ian Ogilvy, Sean Hughes and Nigel Terry(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy tries to impress Miller by going it alone, while the arrival of tax inspector Derek Ford gets the residents of Aidensfield panicked. programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An aristocrat's wealthy, overbearing wife finances a North African archaeological dig to find the skull of John the Baptist. Poirot is in attendance, but when the woman is found stabbed to death, and only her husband, the exuberant Lord Boynton, appears distraught, the detective struggles to identify the killer among the wealth of suspects. Guest starring Tim Curry, Cheryl Campbell, John Hannah, Emma Cunniffe, Mark Gatiss, Angela Pleasence and Beth Goddard, with David Suchet in the title role(n)

programme.title: The Bletchley Circle: San Francisco
programme.desc: A bloodied and battered stranger collapses on Millie and Jean's doorstep, dragging them into a mysterious warring underworld. In a race against time, the four women must unravel the patterns behind a series of attacks in order to avoid becoming the next victims. Drama set during the mid-1950s, following four women gifted with extraordinary intelligence, capacity for pattern recognition and decryption. Crystal Balint, Rachael Stirling, Julie Graham and Chanelle Peloso star(n)

The programme is aired in support of RSPCA, Scottish SPCA, Blue Cross, Donkey Sanctuary and Wildlife Aid Foundation, raising funds for the safety, care and welfare of all the UK's animals, from the tiniest to the most powerful of beasts(n)

A 50ft tree is planned for the annual switch on of the Christmas lights - but first it must be manoeuvred through the streets of London before dawn. programme.title: Britain's Favourite Christmas Adverts
programme.desc: From cat food to Coca-Cola, stocking fillers to stock cubes, Christmas has provided the perfect opportunity to sell the viewing public everything and anything. Here, Julian Clary remembers the good, the great, and the unforgettable. Bill Oddie looks back at his 1980s Christmas Woolworth ads, and Jason Bradbury remembers how the commercials for Action Man made it the must-have toy of the 1970s. Others looking back include Oz Clarke, Anita Harris, Rustie Lee, Hal Cruttenden, Lucy Porter, Natalie Haynes and Mark Borkowski(n)

programme.desc: A US Navy lieutenant dies from arsenic poisoning while secretly visiting an Army general's hotel room. programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the inner workings of the supermarket during the festive period, revealing the secrets of the retailer's success, and how it rose from a grocery chain that once baffled its UK customers, to a brand that took almost one billion pounds in December 2018, enjoying its busiest week to date. The programme also follows the retailer from its arrival in Britain in the 1990s, through changing times and changing tastes to become the brand it is today, and reveals how the discounter came to fill television screens at Christmas, taking on the big name brand adverts with their own festive versions(n)

programme.title: Inside the Mind of Agatha Christie
programme.desc: Exploring the secrets of the author's enduring success and how her works have endured in the bestseller lists for nearly a century. Famous faces and die-hard fans delve deep into the literary archives to investigate what Christie's letters, notebooks and autobiography can tell us about the inner workings of her mind, and uncover the disparity between what people think they know about Christie and who she really was(n)

programme.title: Agatha & The Curse of Ishtar
programme.desc: Young writer Agatha Christie, bruised from her divorce and struggling with fame and success, travels to Baghdad, only to be caught in a web of murder and intrigue. She finds herself mired in the decadent core of the ex-pat community, where rival archaeologists, spoiled funders, bored partners, the downtrodden support staff and the upper-class all co-exist in a hotbed of rumour, feud and scandal. Lyndsey Marshal stars in an alternative history period drama, set in the winter of 1928(n)

programme.title: Greatest Christmas TV Moments
programme.desc: Countdown of 50 festive crackers past and present, including classic soap moments, dramatic endings, sitcom specials, comedy sketches and light entertainment highlights that have made the television set the focus of the holiday season for decades. Highlights include famous couples Den and Angie, Jack and Vera, and Gavin & Stacey; popular double acts Morecambe and Wise, the Trotter brothers and Wallace and Gromit; Doctor Who meeting Kylie Minogue; perennial music show Top of the Pops; and the ultimate irony of sitting down to watch the Royle Family sit down to watch TV for an hour. All small-screen life is here - with jingle bells on. Featuring interviews with cast, crew and assorted celebrity contributors(n)

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris sets out on a mission to visit all four corners of Ireland in just six days, on an ageing network that has seen better days. His journey starts in the south-west at Cobh in Co Cork and his first stop is Blarney Castle, where Chris kisses the famous stone, before he heads to the west coast to ride on an old local line saved by an eccentric local millionaire. He heads to Dublin to visit the jail made famous by the Easter Rising, before ending in Belfast, where he ponders what the future may hold for the railways and for Ireland(n)

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack
programme.desc: PCs Ben, Launa and Rafal were called to a house in Islington, but instead of the simple case of neighbours arguing that they expected, they found a knife-wielding man intent on wreaking havoc. In Hackney, PC Carroll happened across a street mugging, but when she gave chase the attacker suddenly produced a knife(n)

programme.title: Hoarders: Landfill in My Living Room
programme.desc: Documentary following people with a compulsion to hoard. The first episode features a woman diagnosed with cancer whose home is full of rotten food and dead mice, a father whose relationship with his daughter has suffered as a result of his obsession, and a Huddersfield man whose clutter caught fire, burning his house to the ground(n)

programme.title: Animal Farm (1954)
programme.desc: Animals rebel against their unscrupulous owner and take control of his farm, vowing to run things fairly, with equality for all. However, the pigs leading the revolt succumb to greed and corruption, culminating in violence and oppression. Animated drama based on George Orwell's novel, narrated by Gordon Heath and with Maurice Denham providing the voices for all the characters(n)

programme.title: Crack in the World (1965)
programme.desc: A dying scientist and his colleagues conduct experiments to harness the Earth's inner energy that seem set to end in disaster. Sci-fi thriller, with Dana Andrews, Janette Scott, Kieron Moore and Alexander Knox(n)

programme.title: A Thousand Words (2012)
programme.desc: A spiritual guru decides to teach his lying literary agent a lesson for his dishonesty, and places a curse on him. The spell means he can only speak another 1,000 words in his life - and when the words run out, he will die. The only way to break the enchantment is to put right all his past mistakes. Comedy, starring Eddie Murphy and Kerry Washington(n)

programme.title: One Fine Day (1996)
programme.desc: The working day for two mismatched single professionals is thrown into turmoil when their children have to stay at home after missing a school trip. The pair agree to take it in turns to babysit while struggling to stick to their hectic schedules - but during the course of the day their feelings for each other blossom unexpectedly. Romantic comedy, starring George Clooney, Michelle Pfeiffer, Charles Durning and Mae Whitman(n)

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa(n)

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager travelling through Europe is abducted by a gang of sex traffickers. However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace(n)

programme.title: Pyewacket (2017)
programme.desc: An angst-ridden teenage girl awakens something in the woods when she naively performs an occult ritual to kill her mother. Horror, starring Nicole Munoz, Laurie Holden and Chloe Rose(n)

programme.title: Carnage Park (2016)
programme.desc: Two criminals take a woman hostage and flee into the backwoods following a disastrous bank robbery. What should have been a safe haven proves a far greater threat than the cops on their trail when they stray into the territory of a former military sniper driven by his experiences of war and who does not take kindly to strangers on his land. Horror, starring Ashley Bell and Pat Healy(n)

programme.title: Hush (2008)
programme.desc: A motorist travelling by night with his girlfriend nearly crashes into a van on the M1, and as it drives off he sees a badly beaten woman tied up in the back. Stopping at a service station, he panics when his girlfriend disappears and becomes convinced the van driver has abducted her as well. Thriller, starring William Ash, Christine Bottomley and Andreas Wisniewski(n)

programme.title: Rio 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Parrots Jewel and Blu lead a happy life together in Rio with their three chicks, until they find themselves hurled into an expedition up the Amazon. The journey leads to an encounter with an old enemy, while Blu also has to win the approval of Jewel's fearsome father. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx(n)

programme.title: Tora! Tora! Tora! (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama recounting the bombing of Pearl Harbour from both the Japanese and American perspectives, reconstructing the events leading up to the devastating attack on the US naval base in 1941. Starring Martin Balsam, So Yamamura, Joseph Cotten, James Whitmore and Jason Robards(n)

programme.title: The Rewrite (2014)
programme.desc: A washed-up Hollywood screenwriter takes a job at a small university, planning to exploit his position as a local celebrity and do as little work as possible. His cynical outlook begins to change when he falls for a single mother working toward her degree, while a talented pupil makes him consider what he wants from his life. Romantic comedy, with Hugh Grant, Marisa Tomei, Allison Janney and JK Simmons(n)

programme.title: Bridge of Spies (2015)
programme.desc: A lawyer in 1950s New York is hired to represent a Soviet spy in a showcase trial designed to demonstrate the fairness of the US justice system. In the face of public condemnation, he argues against the death penalty, a stance that years later leads to his involvement in an exchange of prisoners in East Germany. Steven Spielberg's fact-based Cold War drama, starring Tom Hanks and an Oscar-winning Mark Rylance(n)

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard (2013)
programme.desc: John McClane goes to Russia having received word that his estranged son Jack is in trouble with the law. He is surprised to discover Jack is secretly a CIA agent, and father and son join forces to take on the Russian Mob, who are engaged in a plot to steal nuclear weapons. Action adventure sequel, starring Bruce Willis and Jai Courtney(n)

programme.title: Snowden (2016)
programme.desc: Oliver Stone's fact-based thriller about US whistleblower Edward Snowden, who was working for America's National Security Agency when he made public thousands of classified documents. Joseph Gordon-Levitt stars, with Shailene Woodley, Melissa Leo, Zachary Quinto, Tom Wilkinson, Rhys Ifans and Nicolas Cage(n)

programme.title: Holy Motors (2012)
programme.desc: A mysterious man spends a day being driven around Paris in a limousine. Every time the car stops, he adopts a new identity, ranging from a hitman to a beggar woman, as he experiences a series of strange encounters with the city's residents. Surreal drama, starring Denis Lavant, Edith Scob, Eva Mendes and Kylie Minogue. In French, English and Chinese(n)

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth (1959)
programme.desc: An explorer discovers a prehistoric monster-infested world deep beneath Earth's crust and faces a tough ordeal escaping the predatory attacks of the creatures as he tries to guide his team back to safety. Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel, starring Pat Boone, James Mason, Arlene Dahl and Diane Baker(n)

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees (1944)
programme.desc: Construction workers battle against Japanese forces while working with the US navy in the South Pacific during the Second World War, while the head of the company and an officer compete for the affections of a local woman. However, when one recklessly causes a tragedy, he seeks redemption by launching an attack on a tank battalion. Drama, starring John Wayne, Susan Hayward and Dennis O'Keefe(n)

programme.title: Hatari! (1962)
programme.desc: A group of reckless animal trappers travels through the wilds of Africa, but the arrival of a beautiful photographer looks set to cause upheaval among the group. Comedy adventure, starring John Wayne, Red Buttons, Hardy Kruger, Elsa Martinelli and Michele Girardon(n)

programme.title: X-Men (2000)
programme.desc: Super-powered outsiders Rogue and Wolverine find themselves at a school for mutants which is run by a benevolent psychic professor. While there, they agree to join others with similar gifts to take on a superhuman mutant terrorist faction intent on establishing dominance over mankind. Sci-fi comic-book adventure, starring Hugh Jackman, Patrick Stewart, Ian McKellen, Anna Paquin and Halle Berry(n)

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp(n)

programme.title: Una (2016)
programme.desc: A young woman arrives unexpectedly at an older man's workplace looking for the truth behind the affair that occurred between them. Drama, starring Rooney Mara, Ben Mendelsohn and Riz Ahmed(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Cafe Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family-run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea: Buenos Aires
programme.desc: The reality show returns with a trip to the Argentinean capital of Buenos Aires getting off to a dramatic start as Liv and Habbs both find themselves single(n)

programme.title: A Royal Winter (2017)
programme.desc: A young woman on a European holiday finds herself in the middle of a real-life fairy tale when a chance meeting with a handsome local leads to something more. Drama, starring Merritt Patterson, Jack Donnelly and Samantha Bond(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Holt find the motivation to help Captain CJ with a big case that is proving problematic. Jeffords imposes a green initiative and tells Gina to remove her precious portable heater from the office. Diaz and Boyle take a break from the night shift to visit a foot massage parlour(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle enlists Peralta's help in tracking down his son's favourite toy for Christmas, but they find themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian crime ring as a result. Back at the precinct, the team members get ready for the annual Christmas carol competition against their rivals at the Metropolitan Transit Authority. Mary Lynn Rajskub guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. A prison van crash sees a mass escape of convicts take place and the entire squad has to track the villains down. Peralta and Santiago make a bet on which of them can bring in the most escaped prisoners, with the loser forced to move into the winner's apartment when they start living together. Former American football star Marshawn Lynch guests(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. Only one fugitive remains on the loose on the streets of Brooklyn after the mass escape of convicts from the prison van and Peralta is forced to enlist a surprising ally in order to apprehend him. Elsewhere, Santiago and Gina attempt to introduce Boyle to proper texting etiquette. Craig Robinson guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cop comedy returns after a mid-season break. When one of the precincts in the area must be closed, an evaluation process takes place. The squad is confident about its assessment - until it turns out the auditor is Santiago's ex-boyfriend Teddy(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A burglary on the set of a TV detective show distracts Peralta and Diaz from the precinct's on-going evaluation. As the rest of the squad concentrate on the task in hand and a new auditor takes over, Peralta finds himself charmed by the glamour of showbusiness(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz tries to soothe Jeffords' ego after a professional setback. Meanwhile, Santiago spends some precious time with Captain Holt. Crime comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Mayim Bialik, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar(n)

Comedy, guest starring June Squibb(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will plans to celebrate his birthday with a grown-up dinner, but his friends face a dilemma when they discover the event clashes with a more popular party. They end up gatecrashing the rival gathering, only to find that Simon's French exchange student steals the limelight(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

His guests include driving instructor Christine, hairdresser Ben, fiery Brazilian Rosie and fridge salesman Gregory. While his food receives mixed reviews, His guests discover his master plan for musical success, suffer bad jokes and find out that one of their fellow diners believes in mermaids(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Peterborough, driving instructor Christine hopes her vegetarian cuisine will grab her the £1,000 prize. But she's worried about being in the firing line, after Rosie compared Muneer's food to vomit on the first night. Now Moony's determined to give Rosie a public dressing down. However, with everyone dreading Christine's meat-free and bland-sounding menu, Rosie may not be the only one who has to bite her lip(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Peterborough, mobile hairdresser Ben plans a gourmet night. Most of his guests are looking forward to some meat after Christine's vegetarian feast the night before. And after laid-back Muneer and critical Rosie seem to have put their tension behind them at Christine's, Ben's determined to take things up a notch as he entertains his guests with his amazing body art, cooking skills and pet crabs(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fridge salesman Gregory serves up a Spanish menu in Peterborough, accompanied by a charm offensive that he hopes will win him the £1,000 prize. Will it work or will the guests give him the cold shoulder?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fiery Brazilian Rosie is confident that her night will be the best of the week in Peterborough. After Gregory used packet mixes, Rosie is determined to show him how to throw a dinner party by making everything from scratch. programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree continue their renovation of a French chateau, 18 months after the end of the first series. So far, only nine rooms have been renovated and many areas of the 12-acre estate have yet to be looked at - but the project is going to have to start paying for itself soon. They make plans to host weddings on the grounds, while looking ahead to keeping livestock and growing their own crops. Dick takes steps to generate solar power during a hot summer, and turns an old oil tank into a pig roaster(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Fresh from the success of hosting a three-day wedding at the chateau, Dick and Angel make business plans for the grounds, intending to charge people to fish in the moat and forage in the woods. Angel starts work on a second guest suite, but also wants to install an elevator, which pushes Dick's engineering skills to the limit(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. programme.desc: A man suffers multiple injuries after a quad-bike accident on a farm near Penrith. Elsewhere, suspected anaphylaxis following a bee sting has the medics racing to the aid of Melody(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: From York House in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, where Brock Bergius hopes that his cheeky sense of humour and perfectionist nature will help him win the competition.
